title: Add hover affordance and render loading states
description: Expandable area/component targets now advertise hover affordance, and viewer/playground render transitions show a short loading animation during view, render-mode, overlay, and explicit render changes.
decision_notes: Added SVG hover styles for collapsed abstraction nodes, zones, and subgraphs so clickable expansion/collapse targets show pointer, shadow, stronger stroke, and label underline.
Added a custom-element loading overlay for <archmap-viewer> and wrapped attribute/toolbox render transitions in a one-frame loading cycle.
Added matching loading overlays to index.html and examples/demo.html because the current playground/demo use direct render() calls rather than <archmap-viewer>.
verification: rg verified hover/loading implementation strings in src/views/svg.ts, src/render.ts, index.html, and examples/demo.html
In-app browser automation was attempted against examples/demo.html, but the click verification timed out twice before producing a stable result.
